comment.body:
If you refer to intraday scalping by mean reversion, you can see this https://open.substack.com/pub/stochvoltrader/p/efficient-market-momentum-mean-reversion?r=2zf7lv&utm_medium=ios 

If you mean the 80% reversion probability and the red dot sell signal, it is likely to be Alma’s patent/secret.
